Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x159A "PEGASIS-07A0-159A" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $07a0 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Pegasis (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $07A0 which copies $38 bytes of code and data back down to $02A7, so that the game could be dumped from $0400.
Note: The source for this game is not a copy of the original disk. Rather, it was extracted from the DISK0573.D64 image contained in OZ Garth's collection gathered by Skylab and uploaded to http://c64disks.hvilket.net/Skylab in 2016. This is a bootleg compilation, but the game files seem to be copies from the original disk.
